title: verbascum × bitlisianum
intro: Verbascum × bitlisianum, also known as the Bitlis mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stature and showy, yellow flowers. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, burns, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × bitlisianum are attributed to its ability to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and reduce fever, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Verbascum × bitlisianum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
